race.comment: NEVER SURRENDER (6) comes through stronger racing, so will appreciate the drop in trip. Wasn't beaten far last time at headquarters and if he can produce a similar effort back in this grade, he will prove tough to stop. Holder sticking is a good sign. RAYMOND'S REWARD (2) shoots to bring up the hat-trick after making a complete mess of his rivals at Clare. This is tougher but that win is hard to ignore. He'll push forward from his draw and prove tough to run down. OLIVE BAGUETTE (1) knuckled down gamely to get the verdict last start at Port Lincoln. Kept fresh and stays at a pet trip. Looks capable of making it two on the bounce. GOOD EXPECTATIONS (9) just tired late when resuming here two weeks ago but is sure to have come on from that. Don't dismiss.
